intro: Aiouea laevis is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as a type of laurel tree. Traditionally, Aiouea laevis has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Aiouea laevis include compounds such as sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
